name: Mrs Fields Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars using a mixer at medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste.
5. Add eggs, peanut butter, and vanilla. Mix at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Add the flour mixture and mix at low speed until just mixed (do not overmix).
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. With a wet fork, gently press a crisscross pattern on top of each cookie.
9. Bake for 8-22 minutes until cookies are slightly brown along the edges.
10. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface with a spatula.
